title: xfsprogs bug fix and enhancement update
overview: An update for Oracle Linux is now available for Oracle Linux 10.
description:
[6.11.0-2.0.1]
- mkfs.xmem: fix agcount issue when formatting pmem filesystems
- mkfs: add mkfs.xmem wrapper script
- mkfs: add configuration files for OL support

[6.11.0-2]
- xfs unrepairable filesystem if directory block not junked in phase 3
- Related: RHEL-89682
full_text:
[6.11.0-2.0.1]
- mkfs.xmem: fix agcount issue when formatting pmem filesystems
- mkfs: add mkfs.xmem wrapper script
- mkfs: add configuration files for OL support

[6.11.0-2]
- xfs unrepairable filesystem if directory block not junked in phase 3
- Related: RHEL-89682

References:
https://linux.oracle.com/errata/ELBA-2025-20143-0.html
